---
title: "Reflection"
---

## Reflection

::: {.callout-note}
The **BAA1104 E-Portfolio and Business Analytics Challenges** module has significantly developed my ability to present analytical work in a professional and structured way. Rather than focusing solely on technical skills, the module emphasised how to effectively communicate data-driven insights through the creation of a complete e-portfolio using Quarto.
:::

---

## Skills Developed

### 📌 Portfolio & Quarto Development
- Learned how to build a **complete website using Quarto**
- Structured pages for consistency across projects
- Integrated **Python code, visuals, and explanations**

### 📊 Communication Skills
- Developed ability to **present analytical findings clearly**
- Improved writing for both technical and non-technical audiences
- Focused on storytelling, not just analysis

---

## Challenges and Solutions

::: {.callout-tip}
**Challenge:** Maintaining a consistent layout across all project pages  
**Solution:** Created a repeatable structure (Overview → Analysis → Findings → Reflection)
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
**Challenge:** Combining code, visuals, and explanations  
**Solution:** Practised structuring content into clear sections and improving readability
:::

---

## Key Learnings

::: {.callout-important}
- Presenting work is just as important as doing the analysis  
- A well-designed portfolio improves clarity and impact  
- Communication is a core skill in business analytics  
:::

The module also included several **guest speakers**, whose insights were extremely valuable. Engaging with them helped me understand how analytical skills are applied in real-world business environments and what employers expect from graduates.

---

## Future Development

- Improve **visual design and interactivity** (e.g. dashboards)
- Continue developing **data storytelling skills**
- Strengthen ability to translate analysis into **business insights**

---

## Conclusion

::: {.callout-note}
Overall, the **BAA1104 E-Portfolio and Business Analytics Challenges** module has been highly valuable in preparing me to present my work professionally. It has strengthened both my communication and analytical presentation skills, providing a strong foundation for future career development.
:::
